name: koopcare-fullstack-demo-platform
description: Independent fullstack demo platform for KoopCare user and admin financing workflows with ML credit scoring integration.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @koopcare-demo/api && npm run build --workspace @koopcare-demo/web
scripts.check: npm run typecheck --workspace @koopcare-demo/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @koopcare-demo/web && npm run build
